{{CargoRelic
|name=World Trade Agreement
|class_id=22787
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The World Trade Agreement is a series of multilateral trade agreements managed by the World Trade Organization. These agreements aim to minimize trade barriers, such as tariffs, quotas, and subsidies, thereby promoting the free flow of goods, services, and capital. The agreement plays an important role in global trade liberalization and conducting international trade on a non-discriminatory and predictable basis.
|fame=107
|art=59
|fth=55
|civ=70
|tech=71
|ss1=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +30<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +240<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss2=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +40<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +4<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +320<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss3=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +50<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +400<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss4=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +70<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +7<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +560<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss5=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +9<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +720<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss6=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +120<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +12<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +960<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss7=Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +120<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +12<br>Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +960<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Blue Card Drops +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
}}
